description_long: This is a handheld digital multimeter, commonly used for measuring electrical values such as voltage, current, and resistance. The device features a rectangular body with a protective orange rubberized casing and a dark central control panel. The front panel includes a large rotary selector switch surrounded by various measurement settings, several push buttons, and input jacks for test leads. A digital LCD display is located at the top, showing measurement readings in clear numerals. The surface is marked with white and yellow printed labels indicating measurement units and ranges. The overall design is compact and rugged, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or on-site electrical work.
description: A compact handheld digital multimeter with an orange rubber casing, rotary dial, buttons, and a digital LCD display for electrical measurements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rotary selector, input jacks, and the lower part of the LCD display.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the orange casing and the slightly raised display screen.
description_view_2: Top view focusing on the full LCD display and the rotary selector in the center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile and the arrangement of buttons and jacks.
